channel.title: Migaki
channel.description: Updates for Migaki — clean, focused video, audio, and GIF transcoding.

item.title: Version 1.2
item.description:
Migaki 1.2

Deep diagnostics, richer reports, and a rebuilt Welcome Tour.

  • VFR Deep Analysis — a new side-by-side sheet inside the Video Quality Report comparing source vs output frame-by-frame, with a shareable copy-ready report
  • Audio Editor's new Audio Info bubble surfaces sample rate, channels, codec, and file size at a glance
  • Quality Reports refreshed across Video, Audio, and GIF — original vs new file size, real audio properties straight from the file, and a reorganized Video report
  • Welcome Tour rebuilt as a practical, screenshot-driven walkthrough

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
Migaki 1.1

Polish, polish, and a fresh tour of what Migaki does best.

  • Refreshed Welcome Tour with new pages for Drop In Ready, Voice and Time Preservation, Quality Verified, and Edit While the Queue Runs
  • Redesigned License page with live device counts pulled from your license
  • One-click promo code shortcuts throughout the app

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
Welcome to Migaki 1.0

The first public release of Migaki — fast, frame-accurate transcoding for video, audio, and GIF.

  • Smart frame rate handling for variable frame rate footage
  • Editor-ready output with constant frame rate and dense keyframes
  • Voice and Time Preservation for screen recordings
  • Dedicated GIF editor with full control over frame rate, dimensions, and speed
